name: mtg-pvp
description: Self-hosted Magic: The Gathering game — card database, deck builder, and hybrid-enforcement multiplayer table for playing at home with the kids.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm:dev:server" "npm:dev:client"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace client run typecheck
